claims.kill_condition: A prior source already defines and empirically validates the same four-part fractional attribution under materially equivalent estimands.
claims.name: four_mechanism_fractional_attribution
claims.proposed_claim: Observed skin-imaging information loss can be quantitatively partitioned into measurement noise, spectral projection, biological collinearity and model mismatch using one integrated adjudication framework.

claims.kill_condition: Prior work performs materially equivalent real-skin-spectrum camera-operator observability and metamer enumeration.
claims.name: real_spectra_camera_observability
claims.proposed_claim: Empirical human skin reflectance spectra can be projected through camera-illuminant operators to quantify observable, weakly observable and metameric biological variation.

claims.kill_condition: Prior work estimates the same recoverable-versus-unrecoverable boundary across calibrated spectra and uncontrolled images.
claims.name: capture_control_boundary
claims.proposed_claim: A measurable boundary can be estimated between variation recoverable through capture control and variation that remains unrecoverable because of observation-operator information loss.

claims.kill_condition: Prior work performs the same three-component quantitative decomposition with external pathology-confirmed validation.
claims.name: physics_contrast_data_quality_decomposition
claims.proposed_claim: Clinical performance disparities can be decomposed into measurement-physics, visible-contrast and dataset-quality components under patient-disjoint external validation.

claims.kill_condition: Prior work already establishes the same subject-balanced, body-site-conditioned representation and its downstream measurement consequences.
claims.name: conditioned_skin_spectral_representation
claims.proposed_claim: Skin spectral structure should be estimated conditionally on body site and subject identity rather than represented by a single global skin-tone scalar.

claims.kill_condition: Prior work implements a materially equivalent governed cross-domain evidence chain with explicit asset-role limits.
claims.name: cross_domain_evidence_chain
claims.proposed_claim: A governed evidence chain can connect calibrated spectral metrology, camera projection, repeated capture, heterogeneous clinical images and pathology-confirmed external validation without treating those assets as interchangeable ground truth.
